hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Spec-driven workflow: use the brainstorm skill for any work request before implementing — it guides a discussion and writes a spec to specs/ at the project root as the decision record. Use implement-spec to execute from an existing spec. Specs are the living source of truth for the project: update them when patterns change, link related ones, and read past Learnings before starting something new."}}'
